== Notes for [[Item:Q83941|Q83941]] ==

Roman senator and consul in the year 51. Executed by Nero in the year 66.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Servius_Cornelius_Scipio_Salvidienus_Orfitus_(consul_51)

== Older matters ==

ID: I84728

Name: Servius Cornelius Servius Salvidienus

Given Name: Servius Cornelius Servius

Surname: Salvidienus

Sex: M

_UID: 7BA79DAB9F84AD4DBFD3A085FCD170FE79AC

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Marriage 1 Cornelia Cethegilla

Married:

Children

Servius Cornelius Salvidienus

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84728

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
